nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Human Embryonic Kidney Cell Derived Exosomes/sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Oligopeptide-1/sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-1/sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-3/sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-59
chemicalDescription: Human Embryonic Kidney Cell Derived Exosomes/sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Oligopeptide-1/sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-1/sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-3/sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-59 are the exosomes released into and isolated from the growth media removed from cultures of human embryonic kidney cells after several days of growth that contain sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Oligopeptide-1, sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-1, sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-3, and sh-Polypeptide-182 Oligopeptide-163 sh-Polypeptide-59. The starting media is Dulbecco's Modified Eagle Medium, and may or may not contain fetal bovine serum.
inciName: HUMAN EMBRYONIC KIDNEY CELL DERIVED EXOSOMES/SH-POLYPEPTIDE-182 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-1/SH-POLYPEPTIDE-182 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-1/SH-POLYPEPTIDE-182 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-3/SH-POLYPEPTIDE-182 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-59
